feed.title: lillytino_
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from lillytino_

entry.title: Did you get them all right? 🤔
entry.content: Did you get them all right? 🤔

entry.title: They didn’t tell me this when i started transitioning 😩
entry.content: They didn’t tell me this when i started transitioning 😩

entry.title: Please use gender neutral language if you’re not sure. For the record, i did not make a stink or call the manager for any of these. Just stood up and left.
entry.content: Please use gender neutral language if you’re not sure. For the record, i did not make a stink or call the manager for any of these. Just stood up and left.

entry.title: Take a look, it’s in a book 🌈
entry.content: Take a look, it’s in a book 🌈

entry.title: Just use gender neutral language - it’s not that hard 🤦🏻‍♀️
entry.content: Just use gender neutral language - it’s not that hard 🤦🏻‍♀️

entry.title: I later learned that a hateful off-duty hard rock employee was watching my stream before this happened and told their manager I was a trouble maker that should be removed from the restaurant. This is why the manager approached me and passively asked me to
entry.content: I later learned that a hateful off-duty hard rock employee was watching my stream before this happened and told their manager I was a trouble maker that should be removed from the restaurant. This is why the manager approached me and passively asked me to

entry.title: The allegations of “frosting in my hair during this video” are unequivocally false. No frosting has been, or ever will be, in my hair. Any suggestions to the contrary are purely speculative.
entry.content: The allegations of “frosting in my hair during this video” are unequivocally false. No frosting has been, or ever will be, in my hair. Any suggestions to the contrary are purely speculative.

entry.title: I grew up in a military family. My father sacrificed for this country. But this is not what he fought for.
entry.content: I grew up in a military family. My father sacrificed for this country. But this is not what he fought for.

entry.title: We shouldn’t have to think like this
entry.content: We shouldn’t have to think like this
